channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-01 13:02 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: 外国人の皆さんに聞きたいです 彼をどう思ってますか？
item.description: 外国人の皆さんに聞きたいです 彼をどう思ってますか？

item.title: @elonmusk: En découvrant le X des Japonais. Je me rend compte qu’il ont la mentalité et la liberté de la France...
item.description: En découvrant le X des Japonais. Je me rend compte qu’il ont la mentalité et la liberté de la France des années 80 qu’on a totalement perdue à cause des gauchistes.

item.title: @elonmusk: If you hate Western Civilization, you don’t deserve to live in it.
item.description: If you hate Western Civilization, you don’t deserve to live in it.

item.title: @elonmusk: Whatever the mainstream media wants you to believe about Elon, this is the truth: he's changing peop...
item.description: Whatever the mainstream media wants you to believe about Elon, this is the truth: he's changing people's lives for the better. “When you haven’t heard someone talk for four years, the thought that they might be able to talk again was mind-blowing."

item.title: @elonmusk: Try out self-driving in a Tesla. It will greatly improve your quality of life and may save your life...
item.description: Try out self-driving in a Tesla. It will greatly improve your quality of life and may save your life.

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD 14.3 is in Tesla employee beta now and will probably go to wide release end of week
item.description: FSD 14.3 is in Tesla employee beta now and will probably go to wide release end of week

item.title: @elonmusk: Some might call this a cunning move 😉
item.description: Some might call this a cunning move 😉

item.title: @elonmusk: If you want to know what’s really safe or what’s not, just try buying insurance for it
item.description: If you want to know what’s really safe or what’s not, just try buying insurance for it

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI's Grok Voice Agent API is insanely good.. You get a voice agent that sounds completely human and...
item.description: xAI's Grok Voice Agent API is insanely good.. You get a voice agent that sounds completely human and handles your always-active customer support across any domain, working for you 24/7 You can now build full voice agents - Medical Office, Restaurant Host, Real Estate, Hotel Concierge, Help Desk or create your own from scratch Even you can do it without any coding or needing a team to spend months setting things up Anyone can now deploy a real AI voice agent to handle calls around the clock for just $0.05/min That's only $3/hour for a worker that never sleeps, never calls in sick, and seamlessly speaks dozens of languages This is the stuff that used to cost companies millions. xAI just made it a template

item.title: @elonmusk: Fusion is 30 years away 🚫 Fusion is 8 minutes away ✅ ☀️
item.description: Fusion is 30 years away 🚫 Fusion is 8 minutes away ✅ ☀️

item.title: @elonmusk: Sheryl Davis, SF's former civil rights watchdog, just got arrested. 19 felony counts. $8.5M steered ...
item.description: Sheryl Davis, SF's former civil rights watchdog, just got arrested. 19 felony counts. $8.5M steered to her live-in partner's nonprofit. But the bigger scandal is the nonprofit industrial complex built specifically to avoid oversight. End the fraud.gli.st/wjcotqqa

item.title: @elonmusk: Open a new door of Imagination. Grok Imagine builds the world around you. Still staring at the door?...
item.description: Open a new door of Imagination. Grok Imagine builds the world around you. Still staring at the door? Thought so. Step inside. Update. Try it.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine makes it easy and fast to create fun videos! Young kids especially love doing image & v...
item.description: Grok Imagine makes it easy and fast to create fun videos! Young kids especially love doing image & video generation using voice mode (press the speak button). And you can turn on kid safe mode in settings:

item.title: @elonmusk: Young Irish teacher Enoch Burke has now spent over 600 days in prison for refusing to use gender ben...
item.description: Young Irish teacher Enoch Burke has now spent over 600 days in prison for refusing to use gender bending ideology for pupils in his class. His mother and sister visited him in jail today, as they left, gardaí were waiting for them, and jailed them too!
